chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S- 248 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 3211/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 3212/19 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on M.A 3213/19 08.03.2019 Mr. Shakir Nawaz Shar, Advocate for applicant alongwith applicant. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4&5. Learned Counsel for applicant submits that the applicant has been falsely implicated in the present case, however, wants to surrender before the concerned Court for seeking remedy as provided under the law. But since he apprehends his imminent arrest at the hands of police, he has filed this application seeking protection to appear before the relevant court. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of 08 days from today subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 08 days on 15.03.2019 or on surrender of the applicantbefore the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
